title: AI Tool Selector Quiz
description: Choose a practical AI tool category based on your task, output format, and workflow needs.
keywords: which AI tool should I use
best AI tool for my task
audience: People deciding which category of AI tool fits writing, research, images, coding, automation, or planning tasks
trendAngle: The AI tool market is crowded, and users need simple guidance before comparing specific products.

faq.question: Does this recommend specific AI brands?
faq.answer: No. It recommends broad tool categories so users can compare options without brand bias.

faq.question: Can one AI tool handle every task?
faq.answer: Sometimes, but specialized tools can be better for images, coding, automation, or team workflows.

faq.question: Does this call an AI API?
faq.answer: No. The generated app uses local deterministic quiz logic and does not call external services.

disclaimer: This quiz is informational only. Review privacy, pricing, accuracy, and data-use terms before using any AI tool.
